entries.description: Mapping-quality status for whether the issuer row is safe for downstream trading and portfolio workflows.
entries.calculation_notes: Published by the government signals gold ETL for strategy consumption.

entries.description: Momentum oscillator measuring the 14-day balance of average gains versus losses.
entries.calculation_notes: Computed by the gold ETL pipeline from canonical domain inputs; see DATA.md for lineage context.

entries.description: ATR-normalized distance from close to the prior completed trading week's high.
entries.calculation_notes: Computed by the gold ETL pipeline from completed weekly OHLCV history with no current-week look-ahead.

entries.description: ATR-normalized distance from close to the prior completed trading week's low.
entries.calculation_notes: Computed by the gold ETL pipeline from completed weekly OHLCV history with no current-week look-ahead.

entries.description: ATR-normalized distance from close to the prior completed month's high.
entries.calculation_notes: Computed by the gold ETL pipeline from completed monthly OHLCV history with no current-month look-ahead.

entries.description: ATR-normalized distance from close to the prior completed month's low.
entries.calculation_notes: Computed by the gold ETL pipeline from completed monthly OHLCV history with no current-month look-ahead.

entries.description: Normalized close location inside the prior 20-day Donchian range; values above 1 or below 0 indicate breakout extension.
entries.calculation_notes: Computed from lagged Donchian bounds so the feature reflects only completed 20-day history.

entries.description: Normalized close location inside the prior 55-day Donchian range; values above 1 or below 0 indicate breakout extension.
entries.calculation_notes: Computed from lagged Donchian bounds so the feature reflects only completed 55-day history.

entries.description: Binary bearish liquidity-sweep flag set when price trades above the nearest confirmed resistance zone but closes back below it.
entries.calculation_notes: Computed from confirmed support/resistance zones and same-bar rejection logic to approximate stop-run behavior from daily bars.

entries.description: Binary bullish liquidity-sweep flag set when price trades below the nearest confirmed support zone but closes back above it.
entries.calculation_notes: Computed from confirmed support/resistance zones and same-bar reclaim logic to approximate downside stop-runs from daily bars.

entries.description: ATR-normalized amount by which the session high pierced the nearest confirmed resistance zone.
entries.calculation_notes: Zero when price does not trade above the confirmed resistance boundary on the session.

entries.description: ATR-normalized amount by which the session low pierced the nearest confirmed support zone.
entries.calculation_notes: Zero when price does not trade below the confirmed support boundary on the session.

entries.description: Fraction of an upside sweep reclaimed back below confirmed resistance by the close; larger values imply stronger rejection.
entries.calculation_notes: Set to zero when no upside penetration occurs, then scaled by the size of the session's resistance overshoot.
entries.calculation_expression: case when high > sr_resistance_1_high then (sr_resistance_1_high - close) / (high - sr_resistance_1_high) else 0 end

entries.description: Fraction of a downside sweep reclaimed back above confirmed support by the close; larger values imply stronger rejection.
entries.calculation_notes: Set to zero when no downside penetration occurs, then scaled by the size of the session's support overshoot.
entries.calculation_expression: case when low < sr_support_1_low then (close - sr_support_1_low) / (sr_support_1_low - low) else 0 end

entries.description: Bars elapsed since the most recent bearish liquidity sweep above confirmed resistance.
entries.calculation_notes: Stateful rolling counter derived from prior `swept_sr_resistance_1` events for post-sweep confirmation logic.

entries.description: Bars elapsed since the most recent bullish liquidity sweep below confirmed support.
entries.calculation_notes: Stateful rolling counter derived from prior `swept_sr_support_1` events for post-sweep confirmation logic.

entries.description: Binary post-sweep confirmation flag set when close breaks below the most recent bearish sweep candle's low within three bars.
entries.calculation_notes: Separates the liquidity event from the follow-through confirmation phase so ranking or gating logic can weight them independently.

entries.description: Binary post-sweep confirmation flag set when close breaks above the most recent bullish sweep candle's high within three bars.
entries.calculation_notes: Separates the liquidity event from the follow-through confirmation phase so ranking or gating logic can weight them independently.

entries.description: Twenty-day rolling Amihud illiquidity proxy measuring absolute return per dollar of traded volume.
entries.calculation_notes: Built from daily return and dollar volume only, using a guarded denominator so zero-volume days do not produce infinities.

entries.description: One-year z-score of the rolling Amihud illiquidity proxy.
entries.calculation_notes: Normalizes the rolling Amihud series against its own 252-day history to detect abnormal thin-liquidity regimes.

entries.description: Twenty-day rolling average of daily dollar volume.
entries.calculation_notes: Uses close multiplied by share volume as the daily execution-capacity proxy for daily bars.

entries.description: One-year z-score of the rolling dollar-volume proxy.
entries.calculation_notes: Normalizes rolling dollar volume against its own 252-day history to capture abnormally weak or strong trading participation.

entries.description: Composite daily liquidity gate that rises when price impact is elevated, participation is weak, and opening gaps are large.
entries.calculation_notes: Intended primarily as a no-trade or down-size regime feature rather than a directional alpha signal.

entries.description: Regime model input value for QQQ close.
entries.calculation_notes: Prepared by the gold regime job as model input telemetry.

entries.description: Regime model input value for IWM close.
entries.calculation_notes: Prepared by the gold regime job as model input telemetry.

entries.description: Regime model input value for ACWI close.
entries.calculation_notes: Prepared by the gold regime job as model input telemetry.

entries.description: Regime model input value for SPY return 20d.
entries.calculation_notes: Prepared by the gold regime job as model input telemetry.
